---
applyTo: "[FILL IN — e.g., apps/backend/** or src/server/**]"

# Backend Context

> Update `applyTo` above to the detected backend folder path so this file loads only when backend files are open.
> Remove this note after updating.

- Backend package name: [FILL IN — e.g., @your-org/backend]
- Runtime requirement: [FILL IN — e.g., Node >= 20]
- Dev command: [FILL IN — e.g., node --watch src/index.js]
- Test framework: [FILL IN — e.g., Vitest]
- Database ORM: [FILL IN — e.g., Prisma with PostgreSQL or N/A]
- Database scripts: [FILL IN — e.g., db:migrate, db:seed, db:push, db:reset]
- Key dependencies: [FILL IN — e.g., bcrypt, cors, jsonwebtoken, express]
- Architecture layers: [FILL IN — e.g., api, core, infrastructure]
